name: Vegetable and Beef Stroganoff with Noodles
recipeInstructions:
Pound and slice tenderloin diagonally into 5"x1/4" strips.  Trim and string snow peas cutting them into lengthwise strips.
1. In a large skillet heat oil. Saute onions and bell peppers, stirring until barely softened, about 8 minutes. Remove vegetables with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. In the same skillet, brown beef slices on one side only for one minute. Sprinkle with pepper and turn slices over. Stir in tomato paste, parsley, worcestshire sauce, sauteed onions and bell peppers, mushrooms, and snow peas. Continue to cook for five minutes. Remove from heat.
3. In a medium saucepan, bring beef broth to a boil. Remove from heat and stir in cornstarch mixture. Return to heat and boil, stirring constantly for thirty seconds or until the mixture thickens. Remove pan from heat and cool slightly.
4. Gently stir in sour cream until just incorporated. Pour sauce over meat and vegetables and reheat gently (do not boil!). Add dill.
5. Place noodles in a large serving platter. Spoon meat, vegetables, and sauce over noodles.
